_comment: Example .claude/settings.json wiring all 10 hook scripts. Copy to your project's .claude/settings.json and adjust paths. Scripts are referenced via $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR so the hook works from any subdirectory.

PreToolUse._comment: Block edits to .env, lock files, .git/, and paths containing 'secret' or 'credential'.
Block dangerous shell commands: rm -rf /, DROP TABLE, force-push to main, curl|bash.
Block SQL mutation statements (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DROP, CREATE, ALTER, TRUNCATE). Allows SELECT.

PostToolUse._comment: Auto-format edited files: prettier (.ts/.js), black (.py), gofmt (.go), rubocop (.rb).
Run linter on edited files: ESLint (.ts/.js/.tsx/.jsx), ruff (.py), rubocop (.rb). Non-blocking.
Log every tool use (tool name, file path, command) as a JSON line to ~/.claude/tool-usage.log.
Find and run a related test file after a source file is edited. Non-blocking.

Notification._comment: Send a native desktop notification. Cross-platform: macOS, Linux, Windows.

SessionStart._comment: After context compaction, re-inject git branch, recent commits, and a project reminder.

Stop._comment: Before Claude finishes, check for uncommitted changes and ask it to commit them.
